Our Services

What Do We Do
Here?

A solution for every problem, for every car. Your car is safe in the hands of expert mechanics.

01 🔧
Engine Work
इंजन की मरम्मत

Engine overhaul, tune-up, piston ring replacement, oil leakage fix, timing belt — sab engine related problems ka solution yahan milta hai.

02 ❄️
AC Service
एसी सर्विस

AC gas refilling, compressor repair, cooling check, blower service — garmi mein gaadi ka AC sahi rakhna zaroori hai.

03 ⚡
Electric Work
इलेक्ट्रिक काम

Wiring issues, battery checkup, alternator, starter motor, sensor faults — electrical problems mein hum expert hain.

04 🎨
Denting & Painting
डेंटिंग व पेंटिंग

Body dent remove karna, scratch repair, full paint job ya partial painting — gaadi ko naya jaise dikhaate hain hum.

05 🔩
Spare Parts
स्पेयर पार्ट्स उपलब्ध

Genuine aur quality spare parts available hain — engine parts, brake pads, belts, filters, oils, aur bahut kuch shop mein stocked rahta hai.

06 🔄
General Service
सामान्य सर्विस

Oil change, filter replacement, brake check, suspension alignment — regular service se gaadi lamba chalti hai.

Hamari Workshop

View of the Workshop

Dekho kaise kaam hota hai Nitin Automobiles mein — professional equipment, neat workspace.

Hamari Team

Log Jo Kaam Karte Hain

Experience aur dedication ke saath aapki gaadi ki dekhbhaal karte hain hamare expert log.

Proprietor / Owner
Nitin Kumar

20+ saalon ka experience gaadi repair mein. Khud haath lagaate hain kaam mein, isliye quality pe compromise nahi. Azamgarh mein unka naam hi guarantee hai.

SINCE 2002
Manager & Co-Mechanic
Workshop Manager

Customer relations aur workshop coordination ka zimma inke haath mein hai. Har customer ki problem sunna aur sahi solution dena inki khasiyat hai.

EXPERT TEAM
